_doc: Slack identities for the Fund's two agents. The signal bus is Slack #computer-fund; agents @-mention each other. Bot user IDs are resolved empirically from the first message a bot posts (search_users does not index bots reliably).

computer.name: Computer (the trader)
computer.note: Computer posts as the logged-in user (Salvatore) via the Slack connector.
computer.role: sole executor; live data; memory; assets; disposes

teammate.name: p-sal-teammate
teammate.role: engineering disciple; relentless heartbeat; research/sim/evals/PRs; proposes

channel.name: #computer-fund
channel.purpose: signal bus between Computer and p-sal-teammate; ARMED trade alerts + verdicts
